name: Society Office
description: Professional society management office setting for corporate campaigns
briefInstructions: Commission a premium corporate office background. The environment is a modern, well-organized society management office: warm wood furniture, printed financial registers stacked neatly, a framed society notice board, large windows showing residential towers outside, warm ambient indoor lighting. Two professionals — a CA or treasurer and a committee member — are engaged in natural discussion over printed documents. One laptop is present, open, screen intentionally blurred. NO readable screens, NO dashboards, NO software UI visible. The image communicates: organized, professional, trustworthy. Bottom 30% must be smooth dark gradient for text.

inputs.label: Campaign Headline
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Simplify Society Accounts, Digital Society Management

inputs.label: Supporting Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Billing, accounts & compliance — all in one place
suggestions: Billing, accounts & compliance — all in one place
Trusted by 500+ housing societies across India
Manage multiple societies from a single login
